'''holakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhachidian|rhachidian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhachidian|rhachidian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holakithi|holakithi]] || [[word:holakiji|holakiji]] || [[word:holakishi|holakishi]] || [[word:holakiki|holakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holakuthuthu|holakuthuthu]] || [[word:holakujuju|holakujuju]] || [[word:holakushushu|holakushushu]] || [[word:holakukuku|holakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holakuthu|holakuthu]] || [[word:holakuju|holakuju]] || [[word:holakushu|holakushu]] || [[word:holakuku|holakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holakufthuf|holakufthuf]] || [[word:holakufjuf|holakufjuf]] || [[word:holakufshuf|holakufshuf]] || [[word:holakufkuf|holakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holakethe|holakethe]] || [[word:holakeje|holakeje]] || [[word:holakeshe|holakeshe]] || [[word:holakeke|holakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holakothotho|holakothotho]] || [[word:holakojojo|holakojojo]] || [[word:holakoshosho|holakoshosho]] || [[word:holakokoko|holakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holakotho|holakotho]] || [[word:holakojo|holakojo]] || [[word:holakosho|holakosho]] || [[word:holakoko|holakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holakofthof|holakofthof]] || [[word:holakofjof|holakofjof]] || [[word:holakofshof|holakofshof]] || [[word:holakofkof|holakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holakĂŻfthĂŻf|holakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfjĂŻf|holakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfshĂŻf|holakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfkĂŻf|holakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|holakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|holakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|holakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|holakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holakĂŻfthĂŻf|holakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfjĂŻf|holakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfshĂŻf|holakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfkĂŻf|holakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holakĂŻfthĂŻf|holakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfjĂŻf|holakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfshĂŻf|holakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holakĂŻfkĂŻf|holakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holakĂŠthĂŠ|holakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:holakĂŠjĂŠ|holakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:holakĂŠshĂŠ|holakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:holakĂŠkĂŠ|holakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holakathatha|holakathatha]] || [[word:holakajaja|holakajaja]] || [[word:holakashasha|holakashasha]] || [[word:holakakaka|holakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holakatha|holakatha]] || [[word:holakaja|holakaja]] || [[word:holakasha|holakasha]] || [[word:holakaka|holakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holakafthaf|holakafthaf]] || [[word:holakafjaf|holakafjaf]] || [[word:holakafshaf|holakafshaf]] || [[word:holakafkaf|holakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holakasha|holakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holakshĂ«sha|holakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holakrosha|holakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holakmusha|holakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holakyasha|holakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholaknkshĂ«sha|goholaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholaknkrosha|goholaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholaknkmusha|goholaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholaknkyasha|goholaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holalakasha|holalakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holalakshĂ«sha|holalakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holalakrosha|holalakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holalakmusha|holalakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holalakyasha|holalakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholalaknkshĂ«sha|goholalaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholalaknkrosha|goholalaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholalaknkmusha|goholalaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholalaknkyasha|goholalaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helĂŠkasha|helĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helĂŠkshĂ«sha|helĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helĂŠkrosha|helĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helĂŠkmusha|helĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helĂŠkyasha|helĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gohelĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelĂŠknkrosha|gohelĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelĂŠknkmusha|gohelĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelĂŠknkyasha|gohelĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfakasha|holfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfakshĂ«sha|holfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfakrosha|holfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfakmusha|holfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfakyasha|holfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfaknkshĂ«sha|goholfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfaknkrosha|goholfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfaknkmusha|goholfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfaknkyasha|goholfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
